result.stderr:
DVoituron.Tools.Swagger2Markdown 1.1.0
Copyright 2019 Denis Voituron
USAGE:
Display a summary of all operations of a local file.:
  Swagger2Markdown --filename C:\MyDocuments\swagger.json
Display a summary of all operations of a remote file.:
  Swagger2Markdown --filename https://mysite/swagger/v1/swagger.json

  -f, --filename    Required. Swagger.json filename to read (local or URL).

  -t, --type        (Default: Summary) Type of report to display (Summary, 
                    MultipleMarkdown)

  -t, --target      (Default: swagger) (Default, 'swagger') Local folder to 
                    write all generated files (summary.md and multiple markdown
                    files).

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
